description: Complete overhaul of the products page: replace all product images with correct high-quality Unsplash photos, rewrite descriptions to be premium export-focused, reorder products per priority list, remove Papaya and Okra, and improve UI with larger cards, consistent heights, premium shadows, and better spacing.
steps: Step 1 - Update next.config.ts to add any additional image domains if needed (currently allows images.unsplash.com, plus.unsplash.com, source.unsplash.com)

Step 2 - In src/app/products/page.tsx, replace the entire 'categories' array with the correct product data following this priority order:

1. Rice (Main Category):
   - Sona Masoori Rice (use: https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1586201375761-83865001e31c?w=800&q=90)
   - Basmati Rice (use: https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1536304993881-ff6e9eefa2a6?w=800&q=90)
   - Non-Basmati Rice (use: https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1586201375761-83865001e31c?w=800&q=90 with different crop, or https://plus.unsplash.com/premium_photo-1723869067492-f2b3c38e15c1?w=800&q=90 for parboiled rice)

2. Fresh Fruits:
   - Mango (Featured) (use: https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1553279768-865429fa0078?w=800&q=90)
   - Pomegranate (use: https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1615485290382-441e4d049cb5?w=800&q=90)
   - Grapes (use: https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1537640538966-79f369143f8f?w=800&q=90)
   - Banana (use: https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1571771894821-ce9b6c11b08e?w=800&q=90)

3. Fresh Vegetables:
   - Onion (Featured) (use: https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1618512496248-a07fe83aa8cb?w=800&q=90)
   - Tomato (use: https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1546470427-0d62b9f43ce8?w=800&q=90 - this shows actual red tomatoes)
   - Potato (use: https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1518977676601-b53f82ber630?w=800&q=90 or https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1508313880080-c5e2e5c0bbbd?w=800&q=90)
   - Green Chilli (use: https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1583119022894-919a68a3d0e3?w=800&q=90 - shows green chillies)

4. Spices:
   - Red Chilli (use: https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1596547609652-9cf5d8c10616?w=800&q=90 for dried red chillies)
   - Turmeric (use: https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1615485500704-8e990f9900f7?w=800&q=90 for turmeric powder/roots)
   - Black Pepper (use: https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1599909533601-aa539e4e2a7e?w=800&q=90 - shows black peppercorns)
   - Garlic Powder (use: https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1540148426945-6cf22a6b2571?w=800&q=90 - shows garlic)
   - Coriander (use: https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1596040033229-a9821ebd058d?w=800&q=90 - shows coriander seeds)

IMPORTANT: Remove Papaya from fruits. Remove Okra from vegetables. Only include the products listed above.

Step 3 - Rewrite ALL product descriptions to be premium, export-focused content suitable for international buyers. Focus on: bulk supply capabilities, export quality certifications, global market readiness, reliable sourcing networks, international standards compliance. Each description should be 2-3 sentences emphasizing export value.

Step 4 - Improve the UI styling of the product cards:
   - Make cards slightly larger with more generous padding (p-6 to p-7 or p-8)
   - Ensure consistent card height using flex-col and flex-grow patterns (already partially done)
   - Add premium shadows: use shadow-xl or custom shadow classes
   - Better spacing between cards: increase gap from gap-8 to gap-10
   - Keep the existing 'Export Quality' badge (gold)
   - Keep the existing 'Bulk Supply Available' badge
   - Image aspect ratio: keep aspect-[4/3] for consistent ratio without stretching
   - Smooth image zoom: keep the existing scale-110 on hover with transition-transform duration-700
   - Ensure no image stretching by keeping object-cover
   - Remove line-clamp-3 to prevent cropped product content (or increase to line-clamp-4)
   - Add a subtle gradient border effect or elevated premium feel to cards
Step 5 - Commit all changes on main branch with message: 'feat: overhaul products page with correct images, export descriptions, and premium UI'
acceptance_criteria: Products page contains exactly 15 products: 3 rice, 4 fruits, 4 vegetables, 5 spices
Papaya and Okra are removed from the products list
Product order matches the priority list (Rice first, then Fruits, Vegetables, Spices)
All product images use Unsplash URLs that correctly depict the named product
All descriptions are export-focused with references to bulk supply, international standards, etc.
Cards have premium styling with larger padding, better shadows, and consistent heights
npm run build completes without errors
Changes are committed on main branch
verification: Run 'npm run build' from /projects/sandbox/deekshi-global-exim and confirm it passes without errors
Run 'git log --oneline -1' to confirm the commit was made
findings: All changes implemented successfully. Papaya and Okra removed, products reordered per priority list (Rice: 3, Fruits: 4, Vegetables: 4, Spices: 5 = 16 total). Descriptions rewritten with premium export-focused content including bulk supply, international standards, sourcing details, and certifications. UI improved with p-7 padding, shadow-premium/hover:shadow-premium-lg (brand-consistent navy-tinted shadows from tailwind.config.ts), gap-10 spacing, line-clamp removed for full descriptions. Build passes cleanly with only pre-existing metadata warnings.
